body.u: For the last seventy years my life had been pretty normal. I left school at sixteen and a half and waited for one month before I finally got the job I wanted as a Beauty consultant in London. I had to leave home because the traveling became totoo much. I moved to London, thinking that everything would be ok and I would have not a thing to worry about. But when I finally moved up there I found out it was not so good after all being on your own not knowing many people around me who to trust etc. So one of the girls I worked with wanted to leave home and she lived with me. We used to have a great time.

When I was twenty I was asked by my firm to go and work abroad. For a while, after a long thought I decide to go. I stayed in France for eighteen months. Then came back here for a month then back in France.
When I was twenty-seven I fell in love with a Frenchman and got married we had only known each other for two months, and the marriage only lasted a year. “That was a year to long”.

So later on I got involved with another Frenchman but I didntdidn't get married again even though I was pregnant. I was not going to fall for that old game again. We got on very well neither of us had to ask premissionpermission to go out with the opposite sex. Until I had the child I could no longer go out because I had to look after it, things between isus began to fall apart until I left and came back to England. Where my mother looked after the baby while I went to work. I work in a factory the money was very good.
For eighteen years I had saved up to go back to France to live even though I had some bad luck the country was really nice and the people were friendly.
I was forty five and my child was no longer a child he was an adult. He was architect so I was very proud of him.

In France I got my job back as a beauty consultant and retired at sixty. I have enjoyed my retirement so far and have also been on one cruise around the world, and intend to go on another one on two yearsyears' time.
